reviews.review_description:
A rather nice casual experience, I do quite enjoy plate invaders in the swarm mode.Give's me that "Nintendo Wii casual gaming with friends vibe" (well thats incentive for me to make a friend  ;) ). Cant think of another Quest game (though I'm sure their are some) that let you play hotseat with up to 8 players (I am not going to say hot helmet, that just sounds wrong!You can just pick the game up and play, no learning curve, though it still gives a general tutorial and full explanation of each of the 4 (5 really, 2 variants of plate invaders) modes.

Will particularly go on my list of games to bust out when more friends (I lied, I do have some friends IRL, honest!) than headsets are available, and/or a few drinks (yeah, I'd never drink and drive or shoot IRL, but in VR, hell yess ;) )

A bit of controller haptics would be nice, but overall a great wee casual game, at a low price,.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! The party game mode has always inspired us, especially for those evenings where you can have a good laugh together with a headset. If you want to join us on our Discord channel, we would be delighted to have you with us.

reviews.review_description: The shooting mechanic is very accurate and graphics is enjoyable. I suggest to join on Discord to chat with other players and follow the development.

This is good fun, pretty tricky to master but rewarding once you get the hang of it.  Would be amazing if you could play with friends and chat at the same time.
A gun calibration would make it much better too as the placement of the gun is a little uncomfortable for me.  Other than that this is a nice chilled game and will be playing lots more!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We're glad you enjoyed the game overall. The multiplayer mode is something we're considering and evaluating how to introduce it, especially regarding communication between friends.We are always available on our Discord for further suggestions or questions.

reviews.review_description: Gteat and fun game, but not that easy as the graphics could suggest... Quite demending and be assured your hands will get sour of holding the gunstock up. Also pigeon physics are spot on. Love the modes in the game, so it does not getting boring after short time. Sound of the gun could be improved IMHO.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, we're glad you enjoyed the game, and we will definitely implement a more impactful sound for the shotgun.We are always available on our Discord for further suggestions or questions.

reviews.review_description:
If you want to take a break by strenuous VR app, this is your game! Relaxing atmosphere, "gummy" scenario, a challenge with yourself or friends! But You have to practice to hit the target! Not so easy! 
Some improvements in graphics and gameplay it's possible, but i'll waiting next release! Good work, guys!

I am not familiar with a specific VR shotgun sport video game, but in general, VR can provide an immersive and exciting gaming experience when it comes to sports games.  The use of motion controllers can simulate the sensation of holding and using a shotgun. However, the success of this game ultimately depends on how the developer will works on its gameplay, graphics, and overall design.

reviews.review_title: Fun game at a great price
reviews.review_description:
I wasn’t expecting much from this game at all but I’m hooked!  The graphics are what at first had me thinking this was going to be a try it once and let new vr users try when they come to visit game….WRONG!
The shooting mechanics and accuracy are done quite well. It’s easy to play yet difficult enough to be very competitive and  addicting!  There are a variety of fun courses and modes so it doesn’t get monotonous. Leaderboards for all difficulty settings is a nice touch 👍. All in all this game is everything I’m looking for in something relaxing or competitive as strange as that sounds. It does have a hot seat option which is very nice to see as there aren’t all that many games that allow multiple users with one headset. I would love to see a normal multiplayer option in the future, I think it’s begging for that!  I know there are a lot of gamers out there who don’t like the violence associated with the majority of gun games so if that’s you, definitely give this a try!  A few other suggestions- The sound of the gun could be better. It’s not terrible, it’s just not a shotgun. It sounds more like a 22 rifle with earplugs in. Give it some bark and some kick! This would greatly improve the immersion factor! Also the hits should be a little easier to see. Add a bigger cloud of dust or haptics or something, it would make a big difference!  So all that being said this as a great affordable game that anyone should enjoy! Give it a try especially if you want a game with endless replay ability for the same price as an overpriced  cup of coffee😂….no brainer. WELL DONE DEVS👍

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your compliments, but especially for the suggestions to improve our game. We are working on introducing a new setting, and we will definitely take your points into implementations. :-) We are always available on our Discord for further suggestions or questions.

reviews.review_title: The shooting range you are lookin for!
reviews.review_description: Basic graphics, no useless distractions, different game modes... this is the shooting range game you are looking for.
It‘s a very nice game where you can train your aim. I couldn’t find any bugs so it’s very good

developer_response.body:
We are really sorry that you did not like our game. As a small indie game company we welcome any reviews (especially the bad ones) as they will help us to grow and understand what we can do to make our products better. Therefore, we would like to know which aspects of the game made you write your review.  Please send us an email to info@breaking-studio.com.
Sincerely, 
Breaking Studio.

reviews.review_title: Lovely shotgun game well focused on aim
reviews.review_description: Lovely start for a new developer: basic 3D graphics, but focus on aiming. You play different shooting games like skeet or trap, but there’s also a fun mode with infinite ammo and a horde approaching. There’s a tutorial and also a training mode; even a multiplayer mode switching the VR headset with your buddies. No movement but just focusing on aiming that is well handed and easy to master. You can also choose different scenarios like Egypt, night, scary or beach, with basic and no invasive graphics. I found no bugs or glitches, sure it’s not one of the most incredible VR experiences but it’s absolutely well done for what it’s aimed to … shotgun sports … and with the right price. Well done, keep the game updated (a new mode is already incoming)
The single player is interesting, but the best part of the game is the party mode. Plate invaders is a great challenge.

Great target practice shooting game. 
Very accurate once you get familiar with it. I rest my right hand in my left forearm. 
Different clay shooting options. I like the Plate invaders. Storm is fast paced. I’ve learned to shot without the sights to keep up

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback. We are thrilled that you are enjoying ShotgunSports, and this motivates us to continuously improve.We are always available on our Discord for further suggestions or questions.

reviews.review_description: Great clay pigeon shooting game with different environments and levels. Took me a little while to get used to it but got there in the end. Looking forward to improving my skills on this game

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback. Keep us updated on your improvements and if you have any new suggestions. We are always available on our Discord for further suggestions or questions.

reviews.review_description: Love this game brilliant shooting game good to improve accuracy for other games and addictivley fun well done to the devs

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Knowing that you find the game enjoyable, motivates us even more to keep improving it. We are always available on our Discord for further suggestions or questions.

reviews.review_description:
Lovely, relaxing game! Some beautiful courses! 

I especially like the sweetopia style one, reminds me of being in walkabout mini golf! Love that this is not an easy game, and they have leader boards to push you on

Especially like the wave option! Great for practicing your aim!! 

Great little app and at a very reasonable price!

Really addictive game

Not sure who rated this a 1 star ⭐️ they obviously have issues aiming a gun 😂

5 STARS ⭐️ ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, we are really glad that you can use ShotgunSports for practice as well. If you want to update us on your progress or give us any other suggestions, you can find us on our Discord channel.

reviews.review_description: Has some very pretty scenes. Shooting plates is challenging just like in real life but I was able to consistently shoot plates after some practice. Developer is really helpful and willing to take feedback for improvements. I highly recommend this game.
